task_objective: Parallelize the initial frontend settings and game-history RPCs so QAM startup no longer waits for those independent reads sequentially.
tests_added: updated tests/test_frontend_static.py::test_frontend_load_initial_optimizations to require parallel settings/history load
design_decisions: Use Promise.all for getSettings() and getGameHistoryCall() because the RPCs are independent read operations.
Keep versions and Ludusavi command discovery in the existing background Promise.allSettled path.
Leave cached-history duplicate state updates and history helper extraction out of scope for this focused performance fix.
results: Ruff check, Ruff format, ty, TypeScript typecheck, pnpm supply-chain verify, and full pytest passed.
Sandboxed pytest timed out on asyncio.to_thread worker tests; rerunning outside the restricted sandbox passed 252 tests.
